GLDDF.Dialog.FatedRollHint: Roll the Aegis Fallen Fate Die with this PF2e check.
GLDDF.Dialog.TyrannyPrompt: {actor} rolled Tyranny {bonus}. Accept the bonus and invite a Tyranny consequence, or refuse it?
GLDDF.Fate.TyrannyAccepted: Accepted: GM adds a Tyranny consequence.

GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.ReloadHint: Dice So Nice texture changes require a Foundry reload. Result and value changes apply to future fate rolls.
